diagnostics.message: TOFU CTR at 0.27% is critically low (SOP alert: <0.4%).
TOFU: CPM stable but CTR weak. SOP: sharpen headline/first 3 sec.

reasons: Only 0 conversions in period (need ~50/week for stable learning)
diagnostics.playbook: Stagnant Results Despite OK Frequency — Algorithm Reset
solutions: Increase budget by 20-25%
Consolidate similar adsets to pool conversions
Broaden audience signals (add Advantage+ targeting)
Add more creative variants to increase delivery

active_playbooks.title: Thumb Stop Recovery — First 3 Seconds Fix
diagnosis: Check video size/aspect ratio mismatch (cropped on feed?)
Compare thumb-stop by audience and placement
actions: Add motion within first 1 second (pan, zoom, text slide-in)
Use face or eyes (human presence increases scroll-stops)
Add headline overlays on first frame ('3BHK | ₹1.35Cr | Ready 2025')
Use pattern interrupts (camera shakes, cuts, quick zooms)
Test UGC hooks ('POV: You finally find a 3BHK with 3 balconies')
Try native feel (looks like a reel, not an ad)

active_playbooks.title: Volume Drop with Stable CPL — Scale & Learning Reset
active_playbooks.trigger: Leads trending DOWN (-24%) while CPL ₹356 is within range
actions: Add secondary ad variants to increase variety
Add new creative hooks or offers
Reverify conversion event is 'Leads' not 'Form Opens'

recommendations.category: Thumb Stop Recovery — First 3 Seconds Fix
recommendations.action: Fix first 3 seconds on 6 video ads
recommendations.detail: Video ads with TSR < 25%: Static_It's designed, Reel_Same_salary_same_job, Static_It's designed. Add motion at 0-1s, use face/eyes, headline overlay, pattern interrupts.
Score: 80.0/100, CPL: ₹232 (within target), 72 leads. SOP: Scale max 25%.
Campaign has 0 leads (need ~50/week for stable learning). Budget: ₹1000/day.
